info.headline: Flood Watch for Warburton River
info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.

info.headline: Flood Watch for Cooper Creek
info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.

info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.

info.headline: Flood Watch for Lake Frome
info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.

info.headline: Flood Watch for Finke River and Stephenson Creek
info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.

area.areaDesc: South Australia: Finke River and Stephenson Creek

info.headline: Flood Watch for Simpson Desert
info.description:
FLOOD IMPACTS ARE EASING BUT CONTINUING ACROSS PARTS OF FLOOD WATCH AREA
Rainfall has cleared across the Flood Watch area, with no further significant rainfall expected over the next few days.
The immediate flood threat is easing. However, flood waters will remain in the landscape and continue to flow through watercourses, causing prolonged overland flooding and ponding. Roads access may be affected, and some communities and homesteads may become isolated. Check road conditions before travelling.
info.instruction: * Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.
